title: aquifoliaceae
intro: The rank of Aquifoliaceae is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic grouping that includes approximately 60 species of trees and shrubs commonly known as hollies. These plants are primarily found in temperate and subtropical regions of the world, with a focus on the Northern Hemisphere. Characterized by their spiny leaves and red or black berries, members of the Aquifoliaceae family are often highly valued for their ornamental and medicinal properties.
